name: Pinterest
description: Access Pinterest API to manage boards, pins, and user accounts.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk:
## Pinterest API

Manage Pinterest boards and pins, and access user account data through the Pinterest REST API.

**Note:** Get your access token at [Pinterest Developers](https://developers.pinterest.com/).

Authorization.description: Pinterest OAuth 2.0 access token (Environment variable: PINTEREST_ACCESS_TOKEN)

tools.name: Get User Account
tools.description: Get the authenticated user's Pinterest account information.

tools.name: List Boards
tools.description: Get a list of the authenticated user's boards.

bookmark.description: Cursor for pagination to get the next page of results

page_size.description: Maximum number of boards to return per page (default 25, max 250)

privacy.description: Filter boards by privacy: ALL, PROTECTED, PUBLIC, SECRET

tools.name: Create Board
tools.description: Create a new Pinterest board for the authenticated user.

privacy.description: Privacy setting for the board: PUBLIC, PROTECTED, SECRET

tools.name: Get Board
tools.description: Get information about a specific Pinterest board.

board_id.description: The unique identifier of the board

tools.name: Get Board Pins
tools.description: Get a list of pins on a specific Pinterest board.

board_id.description: The unique identifier of the board

bookmark.description: Cursor for pagination to get the next page of results

page_size.description: Maximum number of pins to return per page (default 25, max 250)

tools.name: Get Pin
tools.description: Get information about a specific Pinterest pin.

pin_id.description: The unique identifier of the pin

pin_metrics.description: If true, include pin metrics (impressions, saves, clicks) in the response

tools.name: Create Pin
tools.description: Create a new pin on a Pinterest board.

board_id.description: The ID of the board to save the pin to

media_source.description: Media source object containing source_type and url or content (e.g. {source_type: image_url, url: https://...})

link.description: Destination URL when the pin is clicked

board_section_id.description: ID of a board section to save the pin into

tools.name: List Pins
tools.description: Get a list of the authenticated user's pins.

bookmark.description: Cursor for pagination to get the next page of results

page_size.description: Maximum number of pins to return per page (default 25, max 250)
